title: room_hpke_keypair: zeroize of secret_bytes is incomplete
description: mls.rs:396-401: secret_bytes is zeroed via Zeroize after being passed to x25519_dalek::StaticSecret::from(). But StaticSecret::from([u8;32]) moves the bytes and stores them internally; the subsequent zeroize of secret_bytes clears the stack array but not the copy inside StaticSecret. The code then calls secret.to_bytes() to produce a new copy. The net effect is the key material lives in at least two places (inside StaticSecret and inside the Zeroizing return value) — the zeroize call on secret_bytes gives a false sense of cleanup. The StaticSecret does implement Drop with zeroize via the zeroize crate, so this is not a key leak, but the manual zeroize is misleading. Document why the zeroize is not needed (StaticSecret zeros on drop) and remove the extra zeroize call.
